TravelMate - DocsFind a mate and start a journey!

A Flutter app to find your potential travel companion.

Getting Started
Project Documentation
GitHub Repository

📝 Software Engineering Documentation

Complete Requirements Analysis (RAD), System Design (SDD), and Object Design (ODD) documentation.

📱 Flutter Mobile Architecture

Cross-platform mobile application built with Dart, featuring local-first MVP architecture with ValueNotifier state management.

🔌 Service & API Layer

Internal service specifications, data persistence patterns, and future backend API design for Django/PostgreSQL integration.

RAD - Requirements Analysis

Requirements Analysis Document. Complete specifications, use cases, user stories, functional requirements, and project glossary.

Open RAD

SDD - System Design

System Design Document. Architecture, technology stack, data models, deployment strategy, and scalability roadmap.

Open SDD

ODD - Object Design

Object Design Document. Class documentation, interfaces, design patterns, and Flutter architecture layers.

Open ODD

API Documentation

Complete API reference for internal services, data persistence layer, and future backend REST API specifications.

API Reference

Flutter Architecture

Detailed breakdown of 4-layer architecture, design patterns, state management, and core dependencies.

Architecture Guide

State Management

ValueNotifier-based reactive architecture with Singleton stores, reactive UI patterns, and persistence layer.

State Management
